  "themes": [
    {
      "id": "subject",
      "bar_start": 1,
      "bar_end": 2,
      "description": "Fugue subject in A major, soprano voice, begins on scale-degree 1 with an ascending 6th and stepwise continuation, compound triple meter (9/8) with characteristic dotted rhythm and ornamental turn figure"
    },
    {
      "id": "answer_tonal",
      "bar_start": 2,
      "bar_end": 4,
      "description": "Tonal answer in E major (dominant), alto voice entry, adjusted intervallic relationship at the fifth"
    },
    {
      "id": "subject_bass_entry",
      "bar_start": 4,
      "bar_end": 6,
      "description": "Subject entry in bass voice (A major), completing the three-voice exposition"
    },
    {
      "id": "countersubject",
      "bar_start": 2,
      "bar_end": 4,
      "description": "Flowing countersubject in eighth notes accompanying the answer, invertible in double counterpoint at the octave"
    },
    {
      "id": "episode_I",
      "bar_start": 6,
      "bar_end": 9,
      "description": "Sequential episode derived from countersubject material, descending sequences preparing cadence in A major"
    },
    {
      "id": "middle_entry_E_major",
      "bar_start": 10,
      "bar_end": 12,
      "description": "Subject entry in E major (dominant region), alto voice, with invertible counterpoint textures"
    },
    {
      "id": "middle_entry_fsharp_minor",
      "bar_start": 14,
      "bar_end": 16,
      "description": "Subject entry in f# minor (relative minor / submediant), soprano voice, modal mixture coloring"
    },
    {
      "id": "episode_II",
      "bar_start": 16,
      "bar_end": 20,
      "description": "Extended sequential episode with chromatic passing tones, modulating through f# minor toward D major"
    },
    {
      "id": "middle_entry_D_major",
      "bar_start": 20,
      "bar_end": 22,
      "description": "Subject entry in D major (subdominant), bass voice, dominant preparation of A major return"
    },
    {
      "id": "stretto_section",
      "bar_start": 23,
      "bar_end": 28,
      "description": "Stretto passage with subject entries in close imitation between soprano and bass, accompanied by spine-path exchange at bar 25, passing through b minor and e minor"
    },
    {
      "id": "episode_III_sequences",
      "bar_start": 29,
      "bar_end": 33,
      "description": "Virtuosic sequential episode in rapid sixteenth-note figuration, descending through circle of fifths, e minor to A major"
    },
    {
      "id": "final_entries_A_major",
      "bar_start": 33,
      "bar_end": 42,
      "description": "Return of subject in A major with full three-voice texture, multiple overlapping entries and chromatic intensification"
    },
    {
      "id": "coda",
      "bar_start": 42,
      "bar_end": 54,
      "description": "Final section reaffirming A major, subject entries in all voices with episodic passagework, concluding with a full authentic cadence and held final chord"
    }
  ]
}
